examples: She took up a sheet and ratcheted it into the typewriter.
She handed over a form, then bobbed down again behind a typewriter.
He was in his office, battering the keyboard of his computer as if it were an old manual typewriter.
He wrote up contracts with a portable typewriter on the hood of a rental car.
One of his first successes: IBM's Model B electric typewriter (a precursor to the Selectric).
